introText: cy{{claimantName}} has made a property possession claim against you. These are their answers to the questions they were asked when making their claim.
introTextFallback: cyA property possession claim has been made against you. These are the claimant's answers to the questions they were asked when making their claim.
claimPdfSectionTitle: cyDownload a PDF copy of the claim
documentsHelpSummary: cyIf you cannot find a document that you are looking for in this section
documentsHelpBody: cyAll documents uploaded by you or the claimant are on the
statementOfTruthBody: cyI believe the facts stated in this claim form are true. I understand that proceedings for contempt of court may be brought against anyone who makes, or causes to be made, a false statement in a document verified by a statement of truth without an honest belief in its truth.
closeAndReturn: cyClose and return to case overview

sections.asb: cyAlleged antisocial behaviour and illegal or prohibited conduct - WALES ONLY
sections.rentArrears: cyDetails of rent arrears - RENT ARREARS CLAIMS ONLY
sections.actionTaken: cyAction already taken by the claimant
sections.tenancyDetails: cyTenancy, occupation contract or licence details
sections.underlesseeTriage: cyUnderlessees or mortgagees entitled to claim relief against forfeiture

labels.isExemptLandlord: cyIs the claimant an exempt landlord under Part 1 of the Housing (Wales) Act 2014?
labels.propertyAddress: cyAddress of the property the claimant is seeking possession of
labels.hasGrounds: cyDoes the claimant have grounds for possession?
labels.reasonForGround: cyReason for claiming possession under ground {{ground}}
labels.whyClaimingPossession: cyWhy is the claimant claiming possession?
labels.otherInfoAboutReasons: cyIs there any other information the claimant wants to provide about their reasons for possession?
labels.isASB: cyIs it alleged that there is actual or threatened antisocial behaviour?
labels.asbDetails: cyDetails of alleged actual or threatened antisocial behaviour
labels.isIllegalPurposes: cyIs it alleged that there is actual or threatened use of the premises for illegal purposes?
labels.illegalPurposesDetails: cyDetails of alleged actual or threatened use of the premises for illegal purposes
labels.isOtherProhibitedConduct: cyIs it alleged that there has been other prohibited conduct?
labels.otherProhibitedConductDetails: cyDetails of other alleged prohibited conduct
labels.totalRentArrears: cyTotal rent arrears at time of issue
labels.previousSteps: cyHave there been previous steps taken to recover rent arrears?
labels.previousStepsDetails: cyDetails of previous steps taken to recover rent arrears
labels.judgmentRequested: cyJudgment requested for the outstanding arrears?
labels.preActionProtocol: cyHas the pre-action protocol been followed?
labels.preActionProtocolReason: cyWhy has the pre-action protocol not been followed?
labels.settlementAttempted: cyHas a settlement tried to be reached?
labels.noticeNotServedReason: cyStatement of why notice has not been served
labels.noticePersonName: cyName of person the notice was left with
labels.noticeEmailAddress: cyEmail address the notice was served to
labels.noticeOtherElectronic: cyDetails of how the notice was served by other electronic method
labels.noticeOtherMeans: cyDetails of how the notice was served by other means
labels.canUploadNotice: cyCan the claimant upload a copy of the notice served?
labels.cannotUploadNoticeReason: cyWhy can the claimant not upload a copy of the notice served?
labels.tenancyType: cyWhat type of tenancy, occupation contract or licence is in place, or was in place?
labels.tenancyStartDate: cyTenancy, occupation contract or licence start date
labels.tenancyCopy: cyDoes the claimant have a copy of the tenancy, occupation contract or licence agreement?
labels.tenancyNoCopyReason: cyWhy does the claimant not have a copy of the tenancy, occupation contract or licence agreement?
labels.claimantCircumstancesQuestion: cyIs there any information the claimant wants to provide about their circumstances?
labels.defendantCircumstancesQuestion: cyIs there any information the claimant is required to provide, or wants to provide about the defendants’ circumstances?
labels.hasUnderlesseeOrMortgagee: cyIs there an underlessee or mortgagee entitled to claim relief against forfeiture?
labels.demotionQuestion: cyIn the alternative to possession, is the claimant asking the court to order demotion of tenancy?
labels.demotionHousingAct: cyWhich section of the Housing Act is the demotion of tenancy claim made under?
labels.demotionStatement: cyHas the claimant served a statement of express terms on the defendants which will apply to the demoted tenancy?
labels.demotionReason: cyReasons for requesting demotion of tenancy
labels.suspensionQuestion: cyIn the alternative to possession, is the claimant asking the court to order suspension of right to buy?
labels.suspensionHousingAct: cyWhich section of the Housing Act is the suspension of right to buy claim made under?
labels.suspensionReason: cyReasons for requesting a suspension of right to buy
labels.prohibitedConductQuestion: cyIs the claimant seeking an order imposing a prohibited standard contract?
labels.prohibitedConductAgreement: cyHas the claimant and the contract holder agreed terms of the periodic standard contract in addition to those incorporated by statute?
labels.prohibitedConductReason: cyWhy is the claimant making this claim?
labels.epcQuestion: cyCan the claimant upload a copy of the energy performance certificate?
labels.epcReason: cyWhy can the claimant not upload a copy of the energy performance certificate?
labels.gasQuestion: cyCan the claimant upload a copy of the current gas safety report?
labels.gasReason: cyWhy can the claimant not upload a copy of the current gas safety report?
labels.eicrQuestion: cyCan the claimant upload a copy of the current Electrical Installation Condition Report (EICR)?
labels.eicrReason: cyWhy can the claimant not upload a copy of the current Electrical Installation Condition Report (EICR)?
labels.assuredNoArrearsReasonsMinisterOfReligio: cyProperty required for minister of religion (ground 5)
labels.assuredNoArrearsReasonsNoRightToRent: cyTenant does not have a right to rent (ground 7B)
labels.assuredNoArrearsReasonsNuisanceOrIllegal: cyNuisance, annoyance, illegal or immoral use of the property (ground 14)
labels.assuredNoArrearsReasonsPropertyDeteriora: cyDeterioration in the condition of the property (ground 13)
labels.assuredNoArrearsReasonsRepossessionByLen: cyRepossession by the landlord's mortgage lender (ground 2)
labels.walesFailToGiveUpS170Reason: cyFailure to give up possession on date specified in contract-holder's notice (section 170)
labels.walesFailToGiveUpBreakNoticeS191Reason: cyFailure to give up possession on date specified in contract-holder's break clause notice (section 191)
labels.walesLandlordNoticeFtEndS186Reason: cyLandlord's notice in connection with end of fixed term given (section 186)
labels.walesLandlordBreakClauseS199Reason: cyNotice given under a landlord's break clause (section 199)
labels.walesSecureFailureToGiveUpPossessionSect: cyFailure to give up possession on date specified in contract-holder's notice (section 170)
cyFailure to give up possession on date specified in contract-holder's break clause notice (section 191)
labels.walesSecureLandlordNoticeSection186Reaso: cyLandlord's notice in connection with end of fixed term given (section 186)
labels.walesSecureLandlordNoticeSection199Reaso: cyNotice given under a landlord's break clause (section 199)
